category_sources: Official Twine documentation describes it as publishing Python packages to PyPI and other repositories.
source_facts.description says Twine provides utilities for interacting with PyPI.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page title uses Twine.
docs_sources: Official Twine documentation site contains user documentation, changelog, contributing, and API reference.
repo_sources: Official documentation links to the pypa/twine GitHub repository.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official docs describe publishing Python distribution artifacts to PyPI and other repositories.
